news.summary: The board of directors of PotlatchDeltic Corporation (Nasdaq: PCH) has announced a quarterly distribution of $0.45 per share on the Company's common stock. This distribution will be payable on June 30, 2025, to stockholders of record as of June 6, 2025. PotlatchDeltic, a prominent Real Estate Investment Trust (REIT), owns 2.1 million acres of timberlands across states including Alabama, Arkansas, Georgia, Idaho, Louisiana, Mississippi, and South Carolina.
news.headline: PotlatchDeltic declared a $0.45 per share distribution on common stock, payable on June 30, 2025, to stockholders of record by June 6. Leading REIT with 2.1M acres of timberlands.

news.summary: In Medellin, Colombia, Mineros S.A. (TSX:MSA, MINEROS:CB) announced its financial performance for the first quarter of 2025. The company disclosed results for the three months ending on March 31. All figures are reported in thousands of US dollars unless specified otherwise, with detailed financial statements and management analysis available on Mineros' website. For more comprehensive data, interested parties can refer to the company’s unaudited condensed interim consolidated financial statements.
news.headline: Mineros S.A. announces record Q1 2025 financial results. Key numbers not provided in article.

news.summary: Houston-based Vaalco Energy, Inc. (NYSE: EGY, LSE: EGY) announced its operational and financial performance for the first quarter of 2025. The company shared details about its progress during this period, including key figures and outcomes.
news.headline: VAALCO Energy, Inc. announces Q1 2025 results. Operational and financial report released.
Resource company Entrée shares Q1 2025 earnings report.

news.summary: In recent news, it has been reported that the unemployment rate has dropped to a record low of 3.7%. This marks a significant decrease from the previous rate of 4.0%. Additionally, the economy added 250,000 jobs last month, exceeding expectations and showcasing strong growth in the labor market. The positive data suggests a thriving economy and robust job market, providing reassurance for both investors and workers. The decrease in unemployment rate and the substantial job growth reflect a promising outlook for the country's economic stability and future growth prospects.
news.headline: Instagram CEO expresses long-standing concern over TikTok competition, citing growing user base and engagement.

news.summary: 4Front Ventures Corp., a cannabis operator, has disclosed that the Ontario Securities Commission (OSC) issued a failure-to-file cease trade order on May 7, 2025. The company, known as 4Front, trades on the CSE under the ticker symbol FFNT and on the OTCQB under the ticker symbol FFNTF. This announcement was made in Phoenix on May 8, 2025.
news.headline: OSC issued a cease trade order against 4Front for not filing, on May 7, 2025.

news.summary: Sun Life Financial Inc., along with its subsidiaries, joint ventures, and associates, collectively known as "the Company" or "Sun Life," manages operations and reports financial results across five business segments.
news.headline: - Sun Life Financial Inc. reports first quarter 2025 results- Company operates in five business segments

news.summary: On May 8, 2025, the Board of Directors of Sun Life Financial Inc. declared a dividend of $0.88 per share on the common shares of the Company. This dividend is payable on June 30, 2025, to shareholders of Sun Life Financial Inc. The Company's common shares are listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX: SLF) and the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE: SLF).
news.headline: Sun Life boosts dividend to $0.88 per common share, payable June 30, 2025; also declares preferred shares dividends for Q2 2025.

news.summary: On May 8, 2025, Sun Life Financial Inc. (TSX: SLF) (NYSE: SLF) disclosed its plan to initiate a new normal course issuer bid. This decision is contingent on approval from the Office of the Superintendent of Financial Institutions.
news.headline: Sun Life to renew normal course issuer bid, subject to OSFI approval, on May 8, 2025. (TSX: SLF) (NYSE: SLF)

news.summary: Los Angeles-based Faraday Future Intelligent Electric Inc. (Nasdaq: FFAI) disclosed its financial performance for the first quarter of 2025, showcasing noteworthy figures that underscore the company's operational proficiency and financial standing. The California firm, recognized for its global shared intelligent electric mobility ecosystem, reported substantial advancements in the evolution of its FX brand and product portfolio. Additionally, Faraday Future furnished an update on its ongoing projects.
news.headline: Faraday Future (Nasdaq: FFAI) reports Q1 2025 financial results, demonstrating operational and financial progress.

news.summary: In Chicago, Cresco Labs has disclosed the rescheduling of their first quarter 2025 earnings release and conference call. The company has decided to postpone the announcement, and shareholders and investors can now anticipate updated financial results and a conference call at a later date. The rescheduling affects the presentation of crucial figures for the first quarter of 2025, impacting stakeholders who rely on this data for investment decisions and market assessments.
news.headline: Cresco Labs in Chicago postpones First Quarter 2025 earnings release & call.

news.summary: Vancouver-based Wheaton Precious Metals™ Corp. has announced its second quarterly cash dividend payment for 2025 of US$0.165 per common share, marking a 6.5% increase compared to the previous payment. The corporation's Board of Directors approved this decision, reflecting their positive outlook on the company's financial performance.
news.headline: Wheaton Precious Metals announces quarterly dividend increase to US$0.165 per share, up 6.5% from last quarter.

news.summary: On May 8, 2025, Broadridge Financial Solutions, Inc. (NYSE:BR) disclosed its plan to engage in five investor events. Among these events, three will feature fireside chats with company management. Investors interested in accessing these discussions can find them on Broadridge's Investor Relations page.
news.headline: Broadridge (NYSE: BR) to join 5 investor events; 3 fireside chats scheduled with management.

news.summary: In St. Louis on May 8, 2025, Post Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: POST), a consumer packaged goods holding company, announced their second fiscal quarter results as of March 31, 2025. The highlights include second quarter net sales totaling $2.0 billion and an operating profit of $182.2 million.
news.headline: Post Holdings, Inc. reports Q2 results for FY2025: Net sales of $2.0 billion, operating profit $182.2 million.Raises outlook.

news.summary: On May 8, 2025, the Board of Directors of Prologis, Inc. (NYSE: PLD) announced a quarterly cash dividend for the period ending June 30, 2025. Shareholders can expect a dividend of $1.01 per share on the company's common stock. This dividend is set to be paid out on June 30, 2025.
news.headline: Prologis (PLD) declares quarterly dividend of $1.01 per share on common stock, payable on June 30, 2025.

news.summary: The Mohegan Tribal Gaming Authority, based in Uncasville, Connecticut, revealed on May 8, 2025, that they have initiated processes to exchange or buy back for cash their existing 13.25% Senior Notes set to mature in 2027. The offer also includes a request for consents on certain matters related to the notes. This move signifies a strategic financial decision, potentially involving a significant amount of debt restructuring or refinancing.
news.headline: Mohegan starts offers to exchange or buy back its 13.25% Senior Notes due 2027, also seeking consents.

news.summary: On May 8, 2025, Bit Digital, Inc. (Nasdaq: BTBT), a leading global provider of high-performance computing infrastructure and digital asset production based in New York, revealed its plans to unveil the First Quarter financial results. The company specializes in HPC services and is recognized for its expertise in the digital asset space. Headquartered in New York, Bit Digital operates on a global scale and holds a prominent position in the industry. Investors and stakeholders can anticipate the forthcoming release of the financial performance data for the First Quarter.
news.headline: Bit Digital, Inc. (Nasdaq: BTBT) sets First Quarter financial results release for 2025, with a conference call.

news.summary: Experienced Energy Professional with Extensive Industry and Strategic Knowledge Joins Prologis, Inc. On May 8, 2025, Sarah Slusser was appointed to the board of directors of Prologis, Inc. (NYSE: PLD). The decision was made during the company's yearly stockholder meeting. Slusser's election brings valuable expertise, enhancing the board's capabilities.
news.headline: Sarah Slusser joins Prologis Board of Directors at the annual stockholder meeting on May 8, 2025, bringing deep industry expertise.

news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta, on May 8, 2025, TC Energy Corporation shared in a press release that during their 2025 annual shareholder meeting, 13 nominees were successfully elected as directors of the company. The election was carried out through a vote by ballot. The directors are set to serve until TC Energy's subsequent annual shareholder meeting or until their replacements are chosen. TC Energy, listed on both the Toronto Stock Exchange and the New York Stock Exchange under the symbols TRP, highlighted this significant development.
news.headline: TC Energy announces Board of Directors election results with 13 nominees elected at the 2025 annual meeting.

news.summary: On May 8, 2025, MSC Industrial Supply Co., a prominent distributor based in Melville, N.Y., and Davidson, N.C., shared updates about their upcoming investor event. The company, listed on NYSE as MSM, specializes in providing a diverse array of metalworking and maintenance, repair, and operations (MRO) products and services in North America.
news.headline: MSC Industrial Supply Co. (NYSE: MSM) to participate in investor conferences. Key distributor of metalworking & MRO products.

news.summary: Today, Canadian Apartment Properties Real Estate Investment Trust (CAPREIT) disclosed its operational and financial performance for the quarter ending on March 31, 2025. The company's stock symbol is TSX: CAR.UN. A conference call led by management to delve into these results is scheduled for May 9, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. Eastern Time.
news.headline: CAPREIT announces Q1 2025 results, to host call on May 9 at 9:00 a.m. ET to discuss financial performance.

news.summary: Vancouver, BC - On May 8, 2025, Wheaton announced their impressive first quarter financial results, showcasing a robust kickoff to 2025. The company's core assets outperformed production projections, leading to a notable increase in quarterly revenue, adjusted net earnings, and operating cash flow. This success highlights the company's strong performance despite economic uncertainties.
news.headline: Wheaton Precious Metals reports record revenue, adjusted net earnings, and operating cash flow for Q1 2025. Strong start.

news.summary: Richmond American Homes of Florida, LP, a subsidiary of M.D.C. Holdings, Inc., is excited to unveil Coastal Gardens in Palm Coast on Thursday, May 15. The Grand Opening event is set to take place on this date. More details can be found at RichmondAmerican.com/CoastalGardens.
news.headline: Richmond American Homes' new community, Coastal Gardens, will open on May 15 in Palm Coast.

news.summary: NuVista Energy Ltd., based in Calgary, Alberta and listed on the TSX as NVA, reported robust financial and operational performance for the first quarter ending on March 31, 2025. The company highlighted its steady returns from a high-quality asset portfolio, emphasizing the achievement of new production milestones. Progress was made on the company's NCIB to return capital to shareholders, along with a successful renewal and amendment of their three-year covenant-based credit facility to bolster financial stability. Following a successful Q1, NuVista reaffirmed its annual capital and production guidance, showcasing its strong performance in the industry.
news.headline: NuVista Energy Ltd. reports strong Q1 2025 results, enhances shareholder return strategy with progress on NCIB and credit facility.

news.summary: A recent study revealed that 78% of people surveyed believe that climate change is a significant threat to the world. The survey collected data from 2000 individuals across different countries. Additionally, 65% of participants expressed concern about the lack of action being taken to address environmental issues. The study also found that 82% of respondents felt that governments and corporations should be doing more to combat climate change. These findings highlight a growing global awareness and demand for decisive action to protect the environment.
news.headline: Healthcare company Nova Leap reports Q1 2025 financial performance.

news.summary: On May 7, 2025, Kinross Gold Corporation (TSX: K, NYSE: KGC) revealed the outcomes of its Board of Directors election held during the virtual Annual Meeting of Shareholders in Toronto. The specific voting details were disclosed to the public following the event.
news.headline: Kinross Gold Corp. releases election results of Board of Directors after virtual Annual Shareholder Meeting on May 7, 2025.
Interfor announces their financial results for the first quarter of 2025.
Company announces Q1 2025 results.

news.summary: Saint-Bruno-de-Montarville, Quebec, May 8, 2025 - Colabor Group Inc. (TSX: GCL) conducted its annual shareholder meeting on this day. A notable turnout was seen, with 61,043,516 common shares, equivalent to 59.84% of the total shares, being represented either in person or through proxy at the gathering.
news.headline: Colabor Group reports results of shareholder votes: 61.04 million shares (representing 59.84%) were represented at the meeting.

news.summary: In the past year, the Annual Recurring Revenue (ARR) has surged by 54% year-over-year to reach $73.7 million. The Total Revenue has also seen significant growth, increasing by 42% year-over-year to reach $21.7 million. Additionally, the Adjusted EBITDA has climbed by 39% year-over-year to reach $5.6 million.
news.headline: VitalHub's Q1 2025 results: ARR up 54% YoY to $73.7M, Total Revenue up 42% YoY to $21.7M, Adjusted EBITDA up 39% YoY to $5.6M.
ECN Capital's Q1-2025 Adjusted Net Income per Common Share stands at 3 cents.

news.summary: Leading biomedical innovator Femasys Inc. (NASDAQ: FEMY) is making strides in transforming women’s health globally with their innovative solutions. This includes FemaSeed® for first-line infertility treatment and FemBloc® for non-surgical permanent birth control, awaiting full system approval in Europe. The company, based in Atlanta, announced their financial results for the quarter ending March 31, 2025. Femasys Inc. is focused on addressing significant unmet needs in women’s health, offering a range of disruptive, in-office therapeutic and diagnostic products.
news.headline: Femasys reports Q1 2025 financial results, highlighting FemaSeed for infertility and FemBloc for birth control. (characters: 97)

news.summary: The net operating income (NOI) and rent per square foot (PSF) both experienced an increase across the entire portfolio. The same property NOI saw a significant rise, along with the rent PSF, showcasing positive growth in financial performance. This indicates a healthy trend with a notable improvement in the revenue generated by the properties. These increases reflect successful management strategies and market conditions that have positively impacted the financial metrics of the portfolio.
news.headline: Firm Capital Property Trust's Q1/2025 results show increases in Same Property NOI and Rent PSF across the entire portfolio.

news.summary: The Starlight Western Canada Multi-Family (No. 2) Fund reported its Q1-2025 financial results with $5,460 revenue, $3,797 net operating income, and 96.1% physical occupancy across 9 properties. There was a 3.9% increase in average monthly rent (AMR) and $245 net income for Q1-2025. The Fund had $6,353 liquidity and collected 99.2% of rents for the quarter. Adjusted funds from operations (AFFO) for Q1-2025 were $979, a 140.0% increase from Q1-2024. Key financial stats as at March 31, 2025, included $414,646 gross book value, $268,531 indebtedness, and 64.8% indebtedness to gross book value ratio. Weighted average interest rate was 3.25% and average loan term to maturity was 4.84 years.
news.headline: Starlight Western Canada Multi-Family (No. 2) Fund reports 4.2% NOI growth in Q1-2025, AMR up 3.9%, 96.1% occupancy. AFFO at $979, liquidity $6,353.

news.summary: Portman Ridge Finance Corporation reported its first-quarter financial results, including a net investment income of $0.47 per share and a net asset value of $18.85 per share. They deployed around $17.5 million and saw sales/repayments of $15.7 million, resulting in a net deployment of $1.8 million. A quarterly base distribution of $0.47 per share was announced. Total investment income for the quarter was $12.1 million. The investment portfolio had a fair value of $406.4 million as of March 31, 2025. The company encourages investors to vote for the acquisition of Logan Ridge Finance Corporation.
news.headline: Portman Ridge Finance Corporation's Q1 2025 highlights: Net Investment Income of $0.47 Per Share, Net Asset Value of $18.85 Per Share, $17.5 Million Deployed, and $15.7 Million Sales/Repayments. 2nd Quarter will have $0.47 distribution per share. Company encourages shareholders to vote for Logan Ridge Finance Corporation acquisition.

news.summary: SoundHound AI Inc, listed on NASDAQ as SOUN, released their first-quarter financial results after the market closed on Thursday. The company reported Q1 revenue of $29.13 million, falling short of analyst projections of $30.38 million. Despite this, they outperformed expectations for adjusted earnings per share, reporting a loss of six cents compared to the anticipated nine cents. SoundHound's total revenue saw a significant increase of 151% compared to the previous year. Additional information can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: SoundHound AI (NASDAQ: SOUN) Q1 revenue at $29.13M, missing estimates, with a 151% annual revenue increase.

news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta, on May 8, 2025, Athabasca Oil Corporation (TSX: ATH) disclosed that all proposals put forth at the Annual General Meeting of Shareholders on the same date have been completely authorized and ratified. The main agenda items encompassed setting the number of directors to be elected at eight, selecting all eight director nominees as proposed, and confirming the appointment of Ernst & Young LLP as the company's auditors.
news.headline: Athabasca Oil Corp's 2025 AGM approves 8 directors, Ernst & Young LLP as auditors. All presented matters authorized.

news.summary: A significant increase in backlog totaling $13.7 billion was reported, along with positive developments in Revenue, Adjusted EBITDA, and ROIC. Additionally, the company has affirmed its 2025 Guidance.
news.headline: NFI reports record backlog of $13.7 billion and improvements in Revenue, EBITDA, ROIC; reaffirms 2025 Guidance.

news.summary: On May 8, 2025, WSP Global Inc. (TSX: WSP), a prominent professional services firm, conducted its annual shareholder meeting. The Meeting, held in a hybrid format, saw a significant turnout with 109,034,984 common shares represented, amounting to about 83% of all outstanding shares. Shareholders showed overwhelming support by voting in favor of all proposed agenda items. Detailed voting results for each item discussed at the Meeting are provided below.
news.headline: WSP shares annual meeting results: 109,034,984 shares represented (83%); all items of business approved.

news.summary: In Aurora, Ontario on May 08, 2025, Magna International Inc. disclosed the outcomes of its 2025 annual and special shareholder meeting. The meeting, attended by 221,621,186 Common Shares representing 78.66% of the total issued Common Shares, saw unanimous shareholder approval for all agenda items. The company's shares (TSX: MG; NYSE: MGA) were positively received, with resounding support across the board.
news.headline: Magna's 2025 shareholders meeting had 221,621,186 Common Shares or 78.66% represented, with all business items approved.

news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the economy grew by 4.5% last quarter, exceeding expectations. This growth was primarily driven by a surge in consumer spending, which increased by 6.2%. Additionally, exports rose by 3.8%, contributing to the overall expansion. However, business investment saw a slight decline of 1.1%. Unemployment also saw a decline, dropping to 3.8%, the lowest rate in the past five years. Inflation remained stable at 2.1%, staying within the target range set by the government. Overall, the economic indicators suggest a positive outlook for the country's financial health.
news.headline: FLINT reports strong Q1 2025 financial performance with revenue surpassing $100 million, marking a significant growth.
Battery metals company acquires Corvo Uranium Project & secures financing, expanding operations.

news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta, on May 08, 2025, Total Energy Services Inc. reported its financial results for the first quarter of 2025. The company, listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange as TOT, released its consolidated financial figures for the three-month period ending March 31, 2025.
news.headline: Total Energy Services Inc. releases Q1 2025 results. Ended March 31, 2025, TSX: TOT.

news.summary: A recent report reveals that 4 out of every 10 adults in the country are not aware of the importance of vaccinating against the flu. This lack of awareness is concerning as the flu vaccine is crucial in preventing the spread of the virus and its potentially severe outcomes. Furthermore, it was found that only 6 out of 10 adults receive the flu vaccine each year. This low vaccination rate highlights the need for increased education and promotion of flu vaccination to protect public health. Efforts to improve awareness and access to the flu vaccine are essential in reducing the impact of the flu on the population.
news.headline: Northview Residential REIT sees 28% FFO growth in Q1 2025 financial results.

news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on May 8, 2025, Glacier Media Inc. (TSX: GVC) released its financial results for the period ending March 31, 2025. The Company disclosed its revenue and earnings data for the specified period.
news.headline: Glacier Media Inc. (TSX: GVC) reports Q1 2025 results showing revenue and earnings for the period ended March 31.

news.summary: Tarsus Pharmaceuticals, Inc., based in Irvine, California, made public on May 8, 2025, that they will be taking part in various investor conferences soon. The company, listed as TARS on NASDAQ, aims to engage with investors at these events.
news.headline: Tarsus Pharmaceuticals, Inc. to participate in investor conferences on May 08, 2025.

news.summary: Sugar Land, TX - On May 8, 2025, Team, Inc. (NYSE: TISI), a prominent provider of specialty industrial services globally, declared that it is set to reveal its first quarter 2025 earnings on May 12, 2025, post the New York Stock Exchange's closing. The company offers a range of mechanical, heat-treating, and inspection services to its customers. A conference call is scheduled for May 13, 2025, at 10:00 a.m. CT (11:00 a.m. ET) to discuss the financial and operational outcomes.
news.headline: Team, Inc. (NYSE: TISI) will release Q1 2025 earnings on May 12, 2025, followed by a conference call on May 13, 2025.

news.summary: Camping World Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: CWH), based in Lincolnshire, Illinois, announced its achievement in the RV industry. The company, recognized as the World’s Largest Recreational Vehicle Dealer, reported reaching a historic level of new and used unit market share in March 2025 as per data from Statistical Surveys, Inc. Additionally, Camping World's Coleman brand of travel trailers maintained its position as the top-selling travel trailer in the U.S. by unit volume for the year so far through March 2025.
news.headline: Camping World achieves record market share in March, Coleman travel trailers #1 in US year-to-date through March 2025.

news.summary: In Irvine, California, WM Technology, Inc. (Nasdaq: MAPS), a prominent cannabis industry marketplace and technology solutions provider, released its financial results for the first quarter ending on March 31, 2025. The CEO, Doug Francis, expressed satisfaction with the company's performance despite the challenging cannabis landscape. The first quarter saw solid execution amidst industry challenges. The CEO mentioned the ongoing discussion on rescheduling in the cannabis sector, reflecting a renewed interest.
news.headline: WM Technology, Inc. reports Q1 2025 financial results; CEO Doug Francis cites challenging cannabis industry environment.

news.summary: Alaska Communications has partnered with Slalom to offer advanced cloud solutions for businesses and government agencies in Alaska. This collaboration aims to enhance efficiency and sustainability in the oil and gas sector, as well as improve real-time collaboration and learning opportunities in public education. By leveraging managed cloud services, this partnership will drive innovation across various industries in Alaska.
news.headline: Alaska Communications & Slalom partner to provide managed cloud solutions for Alaska enterprises & govt organizations. #innovation #collaboration
